hd8a9b178gd181g4e42ga56dg8e1d689311af: You are unknown to me, kin. Are you straight from the crèche, wandering unbidden?
hc30a082dgdceag4a73g9fe4g95aea849105e: Honestly? I'm not really a gith.
hc3bbe21fg597dg4bfdgb0c7g3561b33a25a2: Tsk'va! You seek to impersonate us? To spy on us?
h2e964d0cg03a5g46f2g877eg54bfccfc0003: Baretha! Kill this fiend. I will continue to hunt for the weapon elsewhere.
hf8e6ec25g4d61g41b4gaeeegb9645cc9a8a0: Play along as a gith. Say you're indeed from the crèche.
hd0150d75g32d8g4647g91c2g53ac99fdabd6: Curious. Most coming from the crèche would come across this bridge behind me. You did not...
h0d3c7714g4173g4977g998bgbe3ff4e34de5: ... but I suppose you are young and untested. This world can be confounding to navigate.
h938f3c15ga65bg4d40ga319gc14a99800c3e: You will return to the crèche and fetch reinforcements. But first, a question...
h02e6193eg4bb4g4156g846aged1b19e6c1c8: We hunt a weapon, taken from the ghaik slave ship. Have you seen such an item?
h18557024g856bg476bg8c46ge509a35ea5bc: *You feel Shadowheart's anxiety. The weapon that Voss seeks is the same one the Absolute's followers are hunting - it's the artefact that she carries.*
h79607835g0efbg49efg881dg8c77ac0a97fb: *Her mind focuses - the giths' suspicion cannot be aroused. They cannot discover that the weapon they seek is right within their grasp.*
h0032b577g9aa0g42f0ga531g638be3c7fa00: I need to know more. What is its appearance? Its purpose?
h4d3616e6g2ea5g40degb117gc893d0912bd1: It is polyhedric in shape, inscripted with the sacred runes of our people. It is our Queen's, and she shall have it back.
hf46012bfgfb6cg48e3gb563gfa7d47829609: Clearly you know nothing of this, vin'iisk. No matter, it will be found. Make for the crèche.
he28dc646ge776g4363gbbd3gc46b18cfc7a2: And if you come across any survivors of the ghaik vessel, kill them and search them. Thoroughly.
h5026a6cegd23cg4bc8gaba2gbd0b762bfc72: Baretha - keep hunting. And do better. Qudenos - we fly!
h71d65dfcg1eaeg4958ga80cge2dfa8aff4a3: I don't know of such a weapon.
hd88c381egaaffg46f2g92dcg6b42d0de7326: No matter. More spears will make short work of this hunt. Make for the crèche.
h74d384e5gc5b3g4233gbcffg343d7d561135: Produce the box. Ask him if this is what he seeks.
hf9892d3cg95abg4a71ga16fg6bfa57546544: It cannot be... you have the weapon? Someone would have reported it to me.
h7a9b61c5gaa33g4ecegaa5fg311897763992: Unless... unless your carried it off the ghaik ship yourself.
he6523a3ag9848g4381g9529g239c14a9a376: *He begins to move his hand in a quick flurry of gestures.*
h52f18da3g76f4g4f34g8596g58cbe4e2d131: *You realise he is casting Detect Thoughts. You feel him rummaging in your head already.*
h9f0be5e5g0230g427agb5c5gce3afb94d768: ... it is true. You were corrupted by the filthy spawn of the ghaik. Yet you still retrieved our Queen's weapon.
hd09dc5a5gae73g4868g83d1gd5eae9a67b51: You have done well, in spite of your affliction. Allow me to reward you. Baretha?
h37636c46g8641g429ega6b3gc7608d0b0eac: Kill him. Make it swift and clean.
haa786515gca21g44e2ga525g8a7f4226d2b6: Kill her. Make it swift and clean.
h79eff4abg34eeg4097g9127gdd55c9356cd1: *You feel a presence in your head - the Kith'rak's presence. Your tadpole recoils defensively.*
h9795eac1g602cg467cg8ac9g2a50d7d53376: *You feel Shadowheart's anxiety. The weapon that Voss seeks - it's the artefact that she carries.*
hf5e737f1g34f0g4db5ga9acg1cc44f736dad: *You realise that the weapon Voss speaks of is the gith artefact you carry. You must keep it from him, same as you must keep it from the Absolute.*
h5eaca970g254eg4898gb4e8g8356aff66ffd: *You realise that the weapon Voss speaks of is the gith artefact you carry. You cannot let him discover it - not matter what.*
h22e765f3gd13cg4f30gb874g27852c8e8a57: *You suddenly feel a strange anxiety take hold - not your own, but that of the artefact you carry. Somehow, it's afraid...*
h8ca76f33g9a20g405ag97aag0b9a3cc5fcf6: *You attune your mind to it. The artefact does not want to fall into the gith raiders' hands any more than it does the Absolute followers'.*
h10ac2248gb62cg433dgb3c3g1c2b0ffe60f2: *You attune your mind to it. The artefact does not not want to part from you. It does not want to fall into the gith raiders' hands.*
h534e5565g8a8cg443ag92b3gd8283457de81: Lies. You speak like the vermin from this wretched world. What are you, a deserter?
h10d88c4agb2deg4b93gba2eg80f3ded69330: No matter. Baretha! This one is no kin to us. Kill him. I will continue searching for the weapon.
hb5abc484g8823g47b8g99a5ga0a0f4c0eef0: No matter. Baretha! This one is no kin to us. Kill her. I will continue searching for the weapon.
h2b8764dbg02feg4a0fgb122gdd40825ff03f: Impersonate a fierce gith and refuse him any explanation.
hbda232eegd36eg4663g87abg95a90efeb75e: Ha! Your tongue is sharp, good. The crèche's hatchlings have not been compromised by this meek, wretched world.
h221d37cbg7b8dg4327g8868g07b7e4995aea: There is no conviction in your voice. What are you? A deserter? A traitor?
h10ecd7c5g6c93g46bfg8b30ge21b35e360e4: Show deference. Bow and explain that you are lost.
hcf9ef130g1a03g4ccbgbef8gbb312a7a83ef: Pa'vrylk! You twist our noble words with a coward's tongue!
h63a936c6g7525g4c59g9a5eg84610a15dad5: This world has made you soft, like rotten fruit. I will not let you shame Vlaakith any longer...
h93b4bee9g5af3g4824ga36cg4b2175330fbe: Baretha! Rid us of this disgrace. I have to continue my hunt for the weapon.
h41092fa2g8edbg4ff1ga78fg1ac8dc26b828: I am no crèche hatchling. Do not speak to me as one.
h964051fegee03g46fcg974dgbb4600f98129: Ha! Your tongue is still sharp, good. This soft world can dull our wits.
h80981f03g5c0bg4b74g813agfca620be507f: We must not linger among such cattle. Even their warriors' blood shames our blades.
h552ffc03g5174g459egb076g57913cd7f263: Tell him about your parasite and ask for help.
h5c28d9e2g02eag4709g82eeg395153c41eb8: I believe you, vin'iisk. No one would lie about such a thing.
h0521b738g4c8bg476bg8658gfefe9e6fe49b: Your troubles are over; we shall help you. Baretha?
h6dfa9578gdda6g4cedgb639g4a506017f92e: Indeed. I came from the crèche.
hc7dc2569g25aeg4ad3gb24fg0b0b62058751: And in the company of local vermin...? Explain yourself, vin'iisk.
h233e79e1g14f3g4ea0g998bg2b3b2a0e5345: These are my comrades. I will not stoop to explain my choice of company.
hc4a769bfg2fc9g4a0ag9202g265318c3da9d: Insubordinate at best. A blood traitor and deserter at worst.
h3946a6f7g289cg4719ga799g5b49c5b43052: Baretha - kill them and search the bodies. I will hunt for the weapon elsewhere.
h344cab13g5777g4408g87b6g7d844283fb33: They are my prisoners. I intend to bring them to the crèche for interrogation.
hf27edefbg49fbg41d8g91f4gc3d965b35f2b: How diligent you are, vin'iisk. If only all of our Queen's warriors served with such rigor.
h5e86dedag1c75g4844g9f4agde546629d884: Take them to the crèche. And see about fetching reinforcements. But first, a question...
hadbb397dg8564g4c0dg9c30g9b6fd40f2743: Your lips spill falsehoods! You have taken on the soft, cowardly ways of this world.
h42294288g8c6dg48b9gb1e7gf95cde7bb37b: These are local guides. I'll get of them once they cease to be useful.
h1d9ff2a7g19b0g46d0gbd14g2af5154cbed2: In the gith tongue, explain that they are local guides - to be killed once they cease to be useful.
hbd884cb1g1173g4d4egb659g615eb612c615: Treacherous shka'keth! Baretha - deal with this! I will continue the hunt elsewhere.
hd804170agc603g4154ga86ag54f2a20515a2: You are unknown to me, kin. Are you straight from the crèche, wandering unbidden?
hfbf0ae16g532fg40f9g8745g52e7c20b49a9: Now now, child - your pet means to speak. Tell me, pet: why shouldn't I run you through this instant?
h32f8c418gc71eg4814g8352gab229d5e172e: What easy prey you make, walking right within my blade's embrace.
h5ab674a0g3810g44cegb859geba4f9c3b27b: These creatures are so simple to ensnare, Baretha. You mewl too much about your task.
h91106c67g0ac1g479bgb8cbgc1e0ffa4fdf5: And as for you, tell me - why shouldn't I run you through this instant?
h3a44a7ffg09bag4966g9d5cgf2ffb94b6f18: Silently hold his stare and discreetly prepare to attack.
h6b3cc6d1g3f8fg4f27ga88egbc9d5cde0d1d: I'll take your silence as respect, kin. But I would have you speak now...
h3579a6e3g2e51g46c6ga13dgbdd192376f83: Hmm. You make good use of silence. Too many think hot air will save them...
h2dd611d0g0e48g457bga930gdc37883cefcd: If you have no use to me alive, I'll have your death, slow and sweet. Understand?
h53a9535dgaa87g4854g82ecg76318821a867: ...you think I don't see that pathetic fumbling? I expected better of my kin.
he31e5da9gd1ffg41f0g9f0bg693d561f9211: ...you think I don't see that pathetic fumbling?
h11949214g20c8g4752gb261gbb002bb34d3e: You would've done so already if you didn't want something from me first.
h2ec9a2e7g4da0g47dbga081gd407015e7bf8: Perceptive, for such an inferior creature.
h0ce262dbg6b14g4f13g8273g7138cc1ad191: For you to keep sucking air, it is necessary for you to tell me something of worth.
h36e6432dge449g45dfg8299g7c1deaa17064: A vessel fell from the sky. We seek a precious weapon that was taken from it.
h5e43fc7bga741g4219g9a64g2c6559d1a21f: *You feel Shadowheart's anxiety. The weapon that Voss seeks is the same one the Absolute's followers are hunting - it's the artefact that she carries.*
hec79073dgdcb8g43e9g9ca7g765c307a1d96: *Her mind focuses - the giths' suspicion cannot be aroused. They cannot discover that the weapon they seek is right within their grasp.*
h23270d27g4cd3g4960gad55gfa8f314ccb6c: Help us find it and I will leave your blood beneath your skin, unspilled.
h84ae9b3bg0509g4d99gb38dg1c53cc1edf3a: Don't help them. Don't tell them a thing. We're dead if you do.
h15b2edd3g6d63g47dcga7e3gba3ce885bc0b: Of course! Obedience is your only hope. Now stand still...
he4c04f46g3139g4a72g93cdge9094b6b067c: Silently interpret the meaning of the gestures.
h69d88b09g20d7g4eeag8137gf1d25e87f86c: Ts'kva! You carry a ghaik parasite in your head! Death will be a kindness to you...
h8fc59ac8g8900g4694gbedcge6e3068d53d0: Bah! Nothing even approaching a useful thought in that skull. I ought to just kill you...
h47ee9339g1aacg4340g9eeeg6fcd9890ad09: Don't be too hasty. I could prove very useful.
h88d19165g0bf4g4a01ga1e5g958bcabde89c: Unlikely. But it costs me nothing to spare your sorry life.
h0b6a0400g6642g42d9g9d0bg230855855f9a: Very well, istik. Seek out survivors from the ship that crashed on this wretched world.
h3c88395ag4471g422ega0a2gecf3002c37ed: Bring me their heads. Bring me the weapon. If you succeed, the reward will be great.
h79e7b1c5g7207g4318ga25eg41f007b5bb6c: I could help if you let me live - search for this weapon, perhaps.
h296e83a6g54ceg4e42ga64eg71a3f999cd83: Unlikely you'd be successful... but it costs me nothing to spare your sorry life.
h7914293cge536g4945g8e58g551cbd5d6f32: Help? Absurd. You're already a hindrance, wasting my time.
heb49a4a5gff49g4f1egbbb6ga46da7d6fcca: Baretha! Rid us of this worm. I need to continue the hunt for the weapon.
h66c46b33gc85fg4cf1g9797gbfb7d5b80272: Why are you hesitating then? Try it, I dare you.
h97427b93g98ebg4151ga535g98e1763a50fa: So bold in the face of death... perhaps you may live after all.
h7db04fb3gc562g446cga529gebab5f5ba01c: Better to let stronger blood thrive. It can give rise to worthier foes and hardier slaves. Don't disappoint me.
hd7257076g9f69g489fgb8adgd31b2168e8c6: You ought to just leave. You've no right to decide my fate.
h6271b96cgc31bg4bd2g9f4bg2782b2c62c2a: My blade is my right. If I can take your life, it is mine. But perhaps you have other uses...
hf23e67b0gdeb1g4fd6g8692g485bbda55351: I have every right: I am strong, you are weak.
h88329904g1f78g4409gbd2ag96dbff442922: Baretha! Show this worm its place. I need to continue my hunt.
h8b7475a9g9366g421dg8764gd9bf2563a37b: A worthless kill - no sport. If this one was even slightly useful, I might spare him...
h974a9a02gfdc5g4eb5g88f4gd7844f78f62d: A worthless kill - no sport. If this one was even slightly useful, I might spare her...
h9eed3e09g6365g44b7gb630gce19d28f635c: You think you can worm your way into my head, simpleton?
h15d02748g8b0fg41e9g9f37g2451d5745ac6: Don't be foolish. I have powerful allies.
h7130e467g61b9g4e93ga46bgfeb764e7c2d9: Then they can mourn for you.
ha95a2612g08ccg4dccg90a9g547c9691d43c: A corpse is useless. But a living informant might unearth something.
h3fecc470g7ab5g4c7agb369g2b9aff34e44d: Curious. I thought even the lowest of creatures had at least a shred of dignity. You prove me wrong.
h6ea871a4g6d48g4987g951fg8fa67e2211e4: But there's a repellent logic in your words. You may notice things a noble gith does not.
hb7af6dc6gfc4bg4901ga1deg8b2bba00e886: Baretha! Kill this insolent worm. I need to continue my hunt.
hce8da829g7fdag43dbg8773g2cdace3e82e5: *The gestures mean nothing to you - some sort of spell that you don't recognise.*
h04bb64ccg5ff6g40f8ga705g0eed1d10d670: He is casting Detect Thoughts - steel your mind to resist it.
h995a4546g1a72g4bdcg9699g39fc31f854c8: You'll need to start from the beginning - what is this weapon you're after?
h8160d450ge32eg4d7dga050g9b7693f14a70: Do not speak. Your bleating offends my ears. Just stand still...
hb83aae3fgcf9cg48adgb93ag2db5947a58d3: Produce the box. Ask if this is what he seeks.
hd48f9302ge521g4260gab73gde5362da3cfd: Just like that, you offer up what I seek. Remarkable. You have my thanks.
h4ee976begd9c9g4496g821fgfe9de44dbbee: In gratitude, I'll grant you a swift death. Baretha? You know what to do.
hfa55bd71gb263g401fga7eag9cfefc13c94c: I might know something. But it'll cost you.
haa8d6e74gff9ag4a15g8f64g5ef33b23edfe: You haggle with your own life, fool. Be silent and hold still...
h669f49f5gefb3g425agb30dg254539ef1c49: Well now. If you are of no use to me alive, I'll have your death.
h9cfe08e1g3487g43f0gb88ag7520deafe890: Lie. Claim you saw bandits loot a wreck, then set off to the west.
h2cbe6aebg88cag4bc4gb547g7bfb765f3c0e: Oh you saw something, did you? Let us see exactly what these bandits took...
hecd34d39geea3g41b8gad4dga73bb02deb09: Help us find it and I will leave your blood beneath your skin, unspilled.
h0565377cge256g4650g98e5g1e1cd4f31fa3: *You feel Shadowheart's anxiety. The weapon that Voss seeks - it's the artefact that she carries.*
h824111bcg25aag420dgaeedg460f0fa03674: *You realise that the weapon Voss speaks of is the gith artefact you carry. You must keep it from him, same as you must keep it from the Absolute.*
h42d2f3f0g1e74g4791g9d2fg08286b837410: *You realise that the weapon Voss speaks of is the gith artefact you carry. You cannot let him discover it - not matter what.*
h55fac708gfaf0g47a0ga2dbg3678f9ff2d8e: *You suddenly feel a strange anxiety take hold - not your own, but that of the artefact you carry. Somehow, it's afraid...*
hec4eef00g9969g44deg986bgca17a16b1ac1: *You attune your mind to it. The artefact does not want to fall into the gith raiders' hands any more than it does the Absolute followers'.*
hd8a84f79g601ag4b4eg8524gb6cc835c61d7: *You attune your mind to it. The artefact does not not want to part from you. It does not want to fall into the gith raiders' hands.*
hf0ee4aacg5f5ag4d4fg92d4gcacc663ad6c4: I want something, yes. But I don't need you to be drawing breath in order to take it...
h3401048dge573g439aga313gac1727f93a38: I just want passage - if I have to go through you, so be it.
h72db30f3gfb7cg4bcega452g11c4358fecfe: Chk! You dare speak to me like my better? Others have died for lesser insults - slowly.
h297c5d70g2c8dg46c3g99f3g7692a4f82dcf: But your bravery amuses me. Finally I find a wolf in a world of lowing cattle...
ha2eda670g4caeg49d1g9606g2079337907de: ... you may live. For the moment.
h9f8332e2ge47bg4eb5g8881ge98b2823459c: Now, we seek a weapon, taken from a vessel that fell from the sky. Understand, istik?
h027fbf64g8377g4e39g96bfg3b6a71e6f2d3: I gave you a chance to save your hide. Instead you chose empty bluster.
ha2dc549fg227cg467cga495g4b90132d21d6: You are a waste of flesh. Perhaps the worms will have use for you.
hdbb616fbg6c3bg41f1gba73gc3d7a44e419f: I don't know you. I pose no threat.
hc2b96ee1gae2bg4435ga458g7f4d0845ebaf: Of course you are not a threat! You are nothing until I tell you otherwise.
h5852a3feg67c0g443aga546g702c18333a49: Threat? Pah! You threaten me no more than the insects scrambling in the dirt.
h6407e7ccga939g4bd5g9293g4edc5a40c46a: Can't you muster a real threat, like flaying or blinding?
h6e2ef126g9274g46b4g8142gf7f113033b01: Chk! I can devise torments beyond your reckoning, rest assured. But time is pressing.
h757e36beg3765g4519ga989g6c5351e1a9a6: Try it -  let's see who walks away alive.
h5df63514g245ag48bdgafdbg946b386bdafb: Claim you're an important person. A valuable hostage - or ally.
heb184a13g3757g4b2fg8ac9gdfc02d2ccb3d: No creature from this wretched world is important, halfwit.
ha493e0beg0516g4572g8f9ag74f31993c74f: The only value you hold is as meat to the carrion birds.
